name: Baton Compatibility Checker
description: Validates baton.yaml configuration files for schema version compliance, node configuration completeness (data_access, authority, openapi_spec), and global endpoint configuration (arbiter, ledger, audit_channel). Produces CheckResult reports with varying severity levels.

types.name: BatonChecker
types.description: Compatibility checker for baton configuration files. Inherits from CompatibilityChecker.

functions.name: tool_name
functions.description: Returns the string identifier for this compatibility checker tool

functions.name: check
functions.description: Performs compatibility checks on a baton.yaml file, validating schema version, node configurations, and global settings. Returns a list of CheckResult objects detailing findings.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object containing minimum schema version and baton config path

inputs.name: base_dir
inputs.description: Base directory to search for baton.yaml files

preconditions: base_dir must be a valid Path object
postconditions: Returns a non-empty list containing at least one CheckResult
If baton config not found, returns list with single INFO CheckResult
If YAML is invalid, returns list with single FAIL CheckResult
Each CheckResult has tool field set to 'baton'

structured_side_effects.description: Reads and parses baton configuration file

functions.name: _find_baton_config
functions.description: Locates the baton configuration file by checking the configured path or searching for baton.yaml/baton.yml in base_dir. Returns None if not found.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object that may contain baton_config path

inputs.name: base_dir
inputs.description: Base directory to search for default baton config files

preconditions: config.stack.baton_config is accessible (may be None or empty)
base_dir must be a valid Path object
postconditions: If config.stack.baton_config is truthy and exists, returns that Path
If config.stack.baton_config is truthy but doesn't exist as absolute, returns base_dir / path
Otherwise searches for baton.yaml then baton.yml in base_dir
Returns None if no config file found

functions.name: _version_lt
functions.description: Compares two version strings (e.g., '1.2.3'). Returns True if version a is less than version b. Falls back to lexicographic comparison if parsing fails.

error_cases.name: version_parse_failure
error_cases.condition: When version strings cannot be parsed as integers separated by dots

postconditions: Returns True if a < b numerically (when parseable as dot-separated integers)
Returns True if a < b lexicographically (when ValueError occurs during parsing)

invariants: All CheckResult objects have tool field set to 'baton'
Default baton version is '1.0' if not specified in config
Config file search order: config.stack.baton_config, baton.yaml, baton.yml
Empty global config defaults to empty dict if not dict type

data_access.rationale: Reads baton.yaml/baton.yml configuration files from disk to validate their structure and content

side_effects.rationale: Needs to read and parse baton configuration files for validation
